title: pilosella praealta
intro: Pilosella praealta, also known as the early mouse-ear hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Pilosella praealta has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone content. This plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antiviral agent. The herbal preparations of Pilosella praealta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
